title: Turkish Retail Customer Segmentation
description: Full-cycle segmentation analysis on a Turkish retail dataset: MySQL queries in Workbench, two-page Power BI dashboard (Gender & Sales / Age & Payment pages) with DAX measures for gender-filtered KPIs and top-category logic. Identified actionable customer clusters for targeted marketing.

title: McDonald's Case Study
description: A complete nutritional analysis of McDonald's 57-item menu using MySQL queries, Power BI dashboards, and DAX measures. Key findings: McDonald's leads all 8 chains with 640 kcal average per item (67% above competitors), 74% of items exceed 1,000mg sodium (2.6× daily limit on worst item), and only 19% of menu qualifies as healthier options. Built with live ODBC connection to remote MySQL database.
